data.title: Implement figma-url-parse.sh: extract Figma file key from URL
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Create plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh that extracts the Figma file key from any supported URL format and prints it to stdout.

## Background
RED integration tests FP-URL-1..4 already exist in tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh. This task implements the script to make those tests pass.

## Supported URL formats
- /design/<key>/  (e.g. https://www.figma.com/design/AbCdEfGhIjKl0123/My-Design-File?node-id=2%3A1)
- /file/<key>/    (e.g. https://www.figma.com/file/XyZ9876abcDEF321/Legacy-File)
- /proto/<key>/   (e.g. https://www.figma.com/proto/Mn0pQrStUvWx1234/Prototype-Flow)

## Implementation Notes
- Use bash regex (sed/grep) to extract the path segment after /(design|file|proto)/
- File key is always the path segment immediately after the URL type segment
- Invalid URL (no figma.com domain, or no matching path pattern): exit 1 with error message on stderr
- Valid URL: print file key to stdout, exit 0
- No external dependencies beyond bash builtins + sed/grep
- Make script executable: chmod +x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh

## .test-index RED marker requirement
After implementing the URL parse script, the integration test suite will still fail on FP-AUTH-1..3 (figma-auth.sh not yet implemented). Add .test-index entries with RED markers for the auth test functions so the test gate tolerates those failures:

IMPORTANT: Append to .test-index via Bash echo/printf, NOT via the Edit tool (Edit tool triggers the formatter hook which reverts .test-index changes). Use:
  printf 'tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh: tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh [test_fp_auth_1_valid_pat] [test_fp_auth_2_invalid_pat] [test_fp_auth_3_env_var_fallback]\n' >> .test-index

Then git add .test-index immediately so it's staged before committing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh
- [ ] /design/ format: extracts correct file key and exits 0
  Verify: output=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh 'https://www.figma.com/design/AbCdEfGhIjKl0123/My-Design-File?node-id=2%3A1' 2>/dev/null); [ $? -eq 0 ] && [ "$output" = 'AbCdEfGhIjKl0123' ]
- [ ] /file/ format: extracts correct file key and exits 0
  Verify: output=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh 'https://www.figma.com/file/XyZ9876abcDEF321/Legacy-File?node-id=0%3A1' 2>/dev/null); [ $? -eq 0 ] && [ "$output" = 'XyZ9876abcDEF321' ]
- [ ] /proto/ format: extracts correct file key and exits 0
  Verify: output=$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh 'https://www.figma.com/proto/Mn0pQrStUvWx1234/Prototype-Flow?node-id=1%3A2' 2>/dev/null); [ $? -eq 0 ] && [ "$output" = 'Mn0pQrStUvWx1234' ]
- [ ] Invalid URL: exits 1 with error on stderr
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/figma-url-parse.sh 'https://example.com/not-figma' 2>/dev/null; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] Integration tests FP-URL-1..4 pass
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'FP-URL-[1-4].*FAIL' | wc -l | grep -q '^0$'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker entry for auth test functions
  Verify: grep -q 'test_fp_auth_1_valid_pat' .test-index

## Escalation Policy
Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference.
